blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,036 ft. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
